title: YO13 9PA, Mr Andrew Hebron and Mrs Karen Hebron: environmental permit issued – EPR/MP3629LC/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mr Andrew Hebron and Mrs Karen Hebron   Installation name: Quarry Farm   Permit number: EPR/MP3629LC/A001   "
